HOSTNAME::webserver01	SERVICEDESC::HTTP Check	SERVICESTATE::OK	SERVICEOUTPUT::HTTP OK: HTTP/1.1 200 OK	SERVICEPERFDATA::time=0.000647s;;;0.000000;10.000000 size=3302B;;;0	SERVICECHECKCOMMAND::check_http!-p 80
HOSTNAME::webserver01	SERVICEDESC::Disk Usage	SERVICESTATE::WARNING	SERVICEOUTPUT::DISK WARNING - free space: / 1234 MB	SERVICEPERFDATA::/=6789MB;7000;7500;0;8000	SERVICECHECKCOMMAND::check_disk!-w 20%!-c 10%
HOSTNAME::dbserver01	SERVICEDESC::MySQL	SERVICESTATE::OK	SERVICEOUTPUT::MySQL OK - 0.001 sec. response time	SERVICEPERFDATA::time=0.001234s;3;5	SERVICECHECKCOMMAND::check_mysql!-H dbserver01
